topCandidates.prompt: When passing through an overflowing road, a higher gear should be used to pass rapidly.

items.promptRawJa: 急ブレーキをかけた場合、アンチロック・ブレーキシステム（ABS）は最大限の制動力を発揮しつつ、前輪の方向転換能力を保つ。
items.promptGlossEn: When you apply the brakes suddenly, the anti-lock braking system (ABS) exerts the maximum braking force while maintaining the steering ability of the front wheels.

topCandidates.prompt: When a motor vehicle installed with an ABS system brakes, the braking distance will be greatly shortened, so you do not have to keep a safe distance between vehicles.
